notes: Added Zhipu GLM-5V-Turbo (glm-5v-turbo), a new multimodal GLM-5 Turbo variant listed on the official BigModel pricing page with text, image, and video input. Its standard pay-as-you-go pricing is 5/7 CNY input, 1.2/1.8 CNY cache hit, and 22/26 CNY output per 1M tokens for input <32k / >=32k; cache storage remains limited-time free. All other tracked model prices and lineup entries were rechecked against official pricing pages and carried forward unchanged.
